title: YUBA COUNTY – Beale Air Force Base has been selected as the

claims.claim_text: Beale Air Force Base has been selected as the preferred site for the U.S. Air Force’s new Collaborative Combat Aircraft (CCA) program.
The Collaborative Combat Aircraft program is a next-generation drone initiative that will shape the future of air combat.
The CCA program will bring national defense innovation, high-tech jobs, and economic momentum to the North State.
The selection of Beale for the CCA program will keep it at the forefront of national defense.
The CCA program will deliver high-paying jobs and advanced technology to Yuba County.
